_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Report test and evaluation deficiencies and possible solutions to appropriate personnel.
reference_document_element_description: Coordinate regulatory examination responses, including information request fulfillment, examiner access management, findings response preparation, and corrective action plan development.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI RC domain. RC-T-011 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DQ-S-001 (DQ, cosine: 0.474), OP-T-003 (OP, cosine: 0.445).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 2.5/10 (raw 0.245). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. DCWF-only terms [appropriate, deficiencies, evaluation, personnel, possible, report] vs WIDAI-only terms [access, action, coordinate, corrective, development, examination] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.859 (P=0.868, R=0.850). Balanced P/R — the 11-word DCWF element and 19-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (97.4%). "Report test and evaluation deficiencies and possible solutions to appropriate pe" and "Coordinate regulatory examination responses, including information request fulfi" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.483 > STS 0.245 (gap +0.238). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [none] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 3.6%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. DCWF terms: [appropriate, deficiencies, evaluation, personnel, possible, report]. WIDAI terms: [access, action, coordinate, corrective, development, examination].

signals.detail: Bi-encoder/STS gap 0.238 with low STS 0.245. Candidate selection was likely driven by shared vocabulary rather than functional alignment. The functionally correct KSA may not have been in the top-5 candidates.
